hero.titulo: Specialist in Oral Rehabilitation, Aesthetics & Implantology
hero.subtitulo: Dental Implants · Fixed Prosthetics · Smile Design · Medellín, Colombia
hero.descripcion: I design and rebuild smiles for people who want to recover not just their teeth, but their confidence, their image, and their ability to project themselves with strength in their personal and professional lives.
hero.credenciales: 17 years of specialized clinical experience · 3,500+ patients transformed in Colombia, Panama, Chile, the United States, and Puerto Rico.

about.bio1: I am Dr. Carolina Macareno, Specialist in Oral Rehabilitation, Aesthetics, and Implantology with over 17 years of experience at prestigious institutions in Medellín. I trained as a Dentist at Universidad El Bosque (2002), completed my postgraduate degree in Oral Rehabilitation at Universidad CES (2009), and pursued advanced training in implantology at FACOP in Brazil and dental aesthetics at New York University — a formation I continue to build upon, because my patients always deserve the best.
about.bio2: I am an expert in dental implants and implant-supported rehabilitation, fixed prosthetics, hybrid prosthetics, overdentures, smile design in ceramic or resin, as well as general dentistry, dental cleaning, and teeth whitening. I work with precise digital planning and lead a team of supporting specialists that enables comprehensive treatment — bringing peace of mind not only to the patient, but to their entire family.
about.bio3: The result is not just restored teeth: it is reclaiming the confidence to smile, speak, and eat freely. It is recovering the image and presence every person deserves. My patients describe it as a before and after in their lives.

implantes.descripcion: Recover the ability to eat, smile and speak with total confidence. State-of-the-art titanium implants with guaranteed osseointegration — the permanent solution that looks and feels like your natural teeth.

protesis.descripcion: The most precise and durable implant rehabilitation: screw-retained fixed prosthetics with no cement, no movement, no compromises. Full functionality and perfect aesthetics from day one.

diseno.descripcion: Your smile redesigned with next-generation ceramic veneers and crowns. Natural, impactful, yours. The change you have wanted for years, achieved in just a few weeks.

rehabilitacion.descripcion: When multiple teeth have been lost or the mouth needs complete reconstruction. From 3D digital planning to definitive delivery — a process that transforms lives.

estetica.descripcion: Professional whitening, composite veneers and minimally invasive techniques. A radiant smile without touching or compromising your healthy dental tissue.

diagnostico.descripcion: The first step of every transformation. Complete digital evaluation, precise diagnosis and a detailed, transparent, personalized treatment plan for your case.

books.descripcion: In this book, I share everything I've learned in over 17 years transforming smiles: the science behind implants, the psychological power of a healthy smile, and the decisions that make the difference between a good treatment and an extraordinary one.
books.descripcion2: Written for patients who want to understand their oral health and make informed decisions, but also for professionals seeking a different perspective on comprehensive rehabilitation.

contact.subtitulo: Take the first step toward your new smile

about_page.metaDesc: Meet Dr. Carolina Macareno, oral rehabilitation and dental implant specialist with over 17 years of experience in Medellín.
about_page.misionTexto: To restore the smile, function, and confidence of every patient who comes to my practice, through the highest quality technical treatments and a genuinely human approach.

blog_page.subtitulo: Articles about oral health, implants and dental aesthetics

conferencias_page.descripcion: Dr. Carolina Macareno is an active speaker at national and international dental conferences. Her talks combine updated scientific evidence with real clinical cases and a humanized perspective on oral rehabilitation.
